name: View System Logs
description: Retrieve system audit logs and cognitive LLM processing error logs to diagnose issues within the batin (inner) modules, API connections, or general system failures.

type.description: The category of logs to retrieve. 'audit' for system events, 'llm' for cognitive reasoning prompts, responses, or error traces, or 'all' for both unified.

limit.description: Maximum number of recent log entries to retrieve.
